underlying_goal: Diagnose and fix a production duplicate entry error in the recommendations service, add test coverage, and understand the root cause
friction_detail: Code review (likely automated or peer) found that the fix silently no-ops on soft-deleted record collisions because update filters with whereNull('deleted_at'), which the user tried to raise twice but interrupted.
brief_summary: User needed to fix a production duplicate entry race condition, add e2e tests, and understand root cause; Claude provided the fix and tests but the solution had an edge case bug with soft-deleted records that was caught in code review.
